name: Streamarr
description: Stream Usenet content on demand through the Streamarr Core Server. Thin adapter — no download-to-disk.
overview: Surfaces the Streamarr Core Server's Usenet search results inside Jellyfin and makes them playable through Jellyfin's transcoding pipeline.
changelog: Fix the resume and seek playback-latency regression with header-only seek probes, a read pacer, and fairer NNTP connection-pool sharing; bound the ephemeral cache with a configurable budget; surface per-stream time-to-first-frame diagnostics; and harden escalated ffprobe analysis and cached artwork badges.
